meta.title: About — My Vanilla Stickson Site
meta.description: Learn more about this stickson-powered site
meta.author: Developer

content.content: This site was built with the stickson JSON framework. Stickson lets you create static HTML pages using a simple JSON file — no complex tools required, just write your content and build.
This is the vanilla CSS edition — plain, custom styles you can fully control.
Simple JSON-based content — no HTML to write manually
Static output — host anywhere, no server needed
Full CSS control — use plain CSS or any framework
Fast builds — generate your entire site in milliseconds
Ready to build your own stickson site? Check out the docs to get started.
Built with stickson — vanilla CSS edition
